gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM bond AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T2.label = '-' AND T1.bond_type = '-'
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id) FROM molecule m JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '-' AND b.bond_type = '-';
question: How many of the single bond type molecules are non-carcinogenic?
